framework.name: Compliance as Architectural Driver
framework.description: Regulatory requirements (EU AI Act, US Executive Order 14110) necessitate layer-specific audit trails and continuous monitoring of agent behavior, fundamentally differentiating agentic architectures from traditional n-tier systems that audit at fixed checkpoints.
framework.raw_quote: Each layer needs independent audit trails and compliance monitoring... compliance teams must monitor learning algorithms, validate decision trees, and ensure agents maintain consistent behavior within acceptable parameters

source.title: Breaking Down the Agentic Layers of AI - Boomi
